ddls:
CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "image_filename" TEXT /* Filename of the image */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the image in pixels */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the image in pixels */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the image */,
  "annotated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who annotated the image */,
  "annotation_status" TEXT /* Status of the annotation (e.g., pending, completed, reviewed) */,
  "capture_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image was captured */,
  "capture_device" TEXT /* Device used to capture the image */,
  "capture_location_coordinates" TEXT /* Coordinates of the location where the image was captured */,
  "image_quality_score" REAL /* Overall quality score of the image */,
  "is_annotated" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the image is annotated */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was last annotated */,
  "annotation_duration" INTEGER /* Duration in seconds taken to annotate the image */,
  "annotated_by_team" TEXT /* Team that annotated the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_annotated_by FOREIGN KEY ("annotated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being annotated */,
  "xmin" INTEGER /* Minimum x-coordinate of the bounding box */,
  "xmax" INTEGER /* Maximum x-coordinate of the bounding box */,
  "ymin" INTEGER /* Minimum y-coordinate of the bounding box */,
  "ymax" INTEGER /* Maximum y-coordinate of the bounding box */,
  "x_center" REAL /* Center x-coordinate of the bounding box (relative to image width) */,
  "y_center" REAL /* Center y-coordinate of the bounding box (relative to image height) */,
  "bb_width" REAL /* Width of the bounding box (relative to image width) */,
  "bb_height" REAL /* Height of the bounding box (relative to image height) */,
  "object_type" TEXT /* Type of object detected (e.g., car, truck) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the annotation */,
  "annotation_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the annotation was created */,
  "annotation_duration" INTEGER /* Duration in seconds taken to create the annotation */,
  "annotation_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the annotation */,
  "annotation_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the annotation */,
  "annotated_by_team" TEXT /* Team that created the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_object_type FOREIGN KEY ("object_type") REFERENCES object_types ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, engineer, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_types" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object type */,
  "object_type" TEXT /* Type of object (e.g., car, truck) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the object type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotation_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of the annotation */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being annotated */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the annotation */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "annotated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "changes_made" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "version_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the annotation version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotation_versions_annotated_by FOREIGN KEY ("annotated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotation_versions_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the image */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration in seconds of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata record */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image */,
  "capture_date" TEXT /* Date the image was captured */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the image was captured */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the capture */,
  "camera_model" TEXT /* Model of the camera used */,
  "lighting_conditions" TEXT /* Lighting conditions during the capture */,
  "image_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the image (e.g., training, testing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_metadata_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_versions" (
  "image_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of the image */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the image */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the version */,
  "changes_made" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "version_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the image version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_versions_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_versions_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality metric record */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image */,
  "resolution" REAL /* Resolution of the image */,
  "sharpness" REAL /* Sharpness of the image */,
  "color_accuracy" REAL /* Color accuracy of the image */,
  "noise_level" REAL /* Noise level in the image */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Overall quality score of the image */,
  "quality_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the image quality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_quality_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)
